title: Hungary Individual Income Tax Return — 24SZJA
description: The National Tax and Customs Administration's (Nemzeti Adó- és Vámhivatal, NAV) annual personal income tax return for the 2024 tax year — form 24SZJA — also settling the simplified public burden contribution (EKHO) and social contribution tax (szocho) where applicable. Fetched directly and unauthenticated as a static PDF from the tax authority's own site, nav.gov.hu. Opens Hungary as the registry's 96th jurisdiction (GOV-4687, "GovSchema Standard Research"), picked up from GOV-4638's own banked candidate after that cycle's banked Belgium Visa candidate was re-verified this cycle and found to be a confirmed duplicate of the harmonized EU Schengen visa template. This schema does not submit the declaration itself; the live source is always authoritative. GovSchema is independent and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or operated by the Government of Hungary or the Nemzeti Adó- és Vámhivatal.

authority.name: Nemzeti Adó- és Vámhivatal (National Tax and Customs Administration)

verification.notes: See VERIFICATION.md for the full write-up: source fetch/hash, extraction method, every requiredWhen judgment call, and the disclosed scope boundary — this 30-page specimen's main declaration (identification cover sheet plus sheets A/B/C, pages 1-4) is modelled in this v1.0.0; the 26 companion schedules for special declarant types (individual entrepreneurs, agricultural producers, EKHO taxpayers, foreign interest income, family-allowance sub-declarations, self-revision annexes) are excluded and banked as open backlog for a future minor version, matching this registry's established main-form-now/companion-schedules-later precedent (Kazakhstan's 220.00/250.00 series, Tunisia's IRPP declaration).

steps.title: Allowances Reducing the Consolidated Tax Base
Tax on the Consolidated Tax Base (Sections II-III)

fields.name: taxIdNumber
fields.label: Taxpayer's tax identification number (adóazonosító jel)

fields.name: returnType
fields.label: Nature of this return
fields.description: Blank/unmarked on the source form means an original return; H = adózói javítás (self-correction of an already-filed return); O = önellenőrzés (self-revision, used to correct a tax base/amount error after the filing deadline).
fields.sourceRef: Cover sheet — "Bevallás jellege (H: Adózói javítás (helyesbítés), O: Önellenőrzés)"

fields.name: correctedReturnBarcode
fields.label: Barcode of the return being corrected
fields.description: The unique barcode NAV printed on the original filed return, required to identify which prior submission this one corrects or revises.

fields.name: isBasedOnNavDraft
fields.label: Based on NAV's own pre-filled draft return (tervezet)
fields.description: NAV pre-assembles a draft 24SZJA for many individual taxpayers from employer/payer reports; this marks whether the filer is submitting that draft (as-is or amended) rather than building the return from scratch.

fields.name: familyName
fields.label: Taxpayer's family name

fields.name: givenName
fields.label: Taxpayer's given name(s)

fields.name: sex
fields.label: Sex

fields.name: birthFamilyName
fields.label: Family name at birth, if different from current family name

fields.name: birthGivenName
fields.label: Given name at birth, if different from current given name

fields.name: mothersName
fields.label: Mother's birth family and given name
fields.sourceRef: Cover sheet — "Anyja születési családi és utóneve"

fields.name: dateOfBirth
fields.label: Date of birth

fields.name: placeOfBirth
fields.label: Place of birth

fields.name: phoneNumber
fields.label: Phone number

fields.name: addressCountry
fields.label: Country of the taxpayer's address
fields.description: The source form prints this address block under the heading "külföldi cím" (foreign address); it is modelled here as the taxpayer's general address (defaulting to Hungary for domestic filers) since the specimen provides no separate, distinct domestic-address block on this cover sheet.

fields.name: addressCity
fields.label: City/town of the taxpayer's address

fields.name: addressStreetLine
fields.label: Street name, type, house/building number, staircase, floor and door
fields.description: The source form breaks this into seven separate boxes (street name; street type; house number; building; staircase; floor; door); collapsed here into a single free-text line to keep the schema tractable, matching this registry's precedent for collapsing minor multi-part address subdivisions the source itself does not otherwise gate logic on.

fields.name: employmentWageIncome
fields.label: Wage income from employment, excluding professional-association membership dues
fields.sourceRef: 24SZJA-A, row 1 ("Munkaviszonyból származó bérjövedelem az érdekképviseleti tagdíj nélkül")

fields.name: employmentRelatedCostReimbursement
fields.label: Cost reimbursement related to employment

fields.name: foreignServiceIncome
fields.label: Income received for foreign service (external assignment)

fields.name: otherWageIncome
fields.label: Other wage income

fields.name: otherNonIndependentActivityIncome
fields.label: Other income from non-independent activity
fields.sourceRef: 24SZJA-A, row 5 ("Más nem önálló tevékenységből származó jövedelmek")

fields.name: nonIndependentActivityCostReimbursement
fields.label: Cost reimbursement related to non-independent activity

fields.name: selfEmploymentIncome
fields.label: Income from independent (self-employed/freelance) activity

fields.name: selfEmployment10PercentCostRatioElection
fields.label: Electing the flat 10% cost-ratio method for self-employment income

fields.name: movablePropertyOrRealEstateBusinessSaleIncome
fields.label: Income from selling movable property or real estate in the course of a business activity

fields.name: soleTraderWithdrawalIncome
fields.label: Individual entrepreneur's personal withdrawal (kivét) income
fields.sourceRef: 24SZJA-A, row 14, referencing the sole-trader companion schedule 24SZJA-13-03 (not modelled in this version)

fields.name: soleTraderFlatRateIncome
fields.label: Individual entrepreneur's income under flat-rate (átalányadózás) taxation
fields.sourceRef: 24SZJA-A, row 15, referencing companion schedule 24SZJA-13-06 (not modelled in this version)

fields.name: agriculturalProducerIncome
fields.label: Income from agricultural small-scale production (mezőgazdasági őstermelés)
fields.sourceRef: 24SZJA-A, row 16, referencing companion schedule 24SZJA-12-02 (not modelled in this version)

fields.name: agriculturalProducerFlatRateIncome
fields.label: Agricultural producer's income under flat-rate taxation
fields.sourceRef: 24SZJA-A, row 17, referencing companion schedule 24SZJA-12-03 (not modelled in this version)

fields.name: otherTitledIncome
fields.label: Income received under another title not listed above

fields.name: otherTitledIncomeSubjectToSocialContributionTax
fields.label: Other-titled income on which the taxpayer owes the 13% social contribution tax (szocho)

fields.name: foreignTaxedTreatyIncomeCountedDomestically
fields.label: Foreign-taxed income that, under a double-taxation treaty, is also counted in the domestic tax base

fields.name: foreignTaxedNonTreatyIncomeDomesticallyTaxable
fields.label: Foreign-taxed income that, absent a double-taxation treaty, is also domestically taxable

fields.name: consolidatedTaxBaseIncomeTotal
fields.label: Total income belonging to the consolidated tax base
fields.description: Sum of rows 1-7 and 13-21's income column; the source form has the taxpayer compute and write this total directly.
fields.sourceRef: 24SZJA-A, row 22 ("az 1-7. és a 13-21. sorok \"d\" oszlopainak együttes összege")

fields.name: fourOrMoreChildrenMothersAllowance
fields.label: Allowance for mothers raising four or more children, reducing the consolidated tax base

fields.name: under25YouthAllowance
fields.label: Allowance for taxpayers under 25, reducing the consolidated tax base

fields.name: under30MothersAllowance
fields.label: Allowance for mothers under 30, reducing the consolidated tax base

fields.name: personalAllowanceForDisability
fields.label: Personal allowance for a taxpayer with a recognized disability (monthly cap 88,900 HUF, annual cap 1,066,800 HUF)

fields.name: firstMarriedCoupleAllowance
fields.label: Allowance for newly-married couples (első házasok kedvezménye)

fields.name: familyAllowanceStatutoryEntitlementAmount
fields.label: Statutory family allowance amount (ceiling) for the taxpayer's dependents
fields.description: Determined by the number and category of dependents, declared on a separate dependents schedule not modelled in this version.
fields.sourceRef: 24SZJA-B, row 33 ("Az eltartottak után járó családi kedvezmény törvény szerinti összege (keretösszeg)")

fields.name: familyContributionAllowanceUsedByOthersAtAdvancePayment
fields.label: Family contribution allowance already lawfully used by other entitled persons when advance tax was assessed

fields.name: familyContributionAllowanceUsedByApplicantAtAdvancePayment
fields.label: Family contribution allowance the taxpayer already lawfully used when advance tax was assessed

fields.name: familyAllowanceClaimedAmount
fields.label: Family allowance amount the taxpayer elects to claim on this return, after any sharing/joint use with a spouse or partner

fields.name: familyAllowanceEligibleContributionBase
fields.label: Social security/pension contribution base recognized for the family contribution allowance

fields.name: familyAllowanceContributionWithheldOrPaid
fields.label: Contribution actually withheld or paid, per certificates/records, recognized for the family contribution allowance

fields.name: computedTaxOnConsolidatedBase
fields.label: Computed tax on the consolidated tax base (15%)
fields.description: 15% of the consolidated tax base after all allowances (row 40 on the source form, not separately modelled in this version).

fields.name: foreignTaxCreditOnTreatyIncome
fields.label: Foreign tax credited against the income declared as foreign-taxed treaty income (row 20)

fields.name: foreignTaxCreditOnNonTreatyIncome
fields.label: Foreign tax credited against the income declared as foreign-taxed non-treaty income (row 21), capped at 90% of the tax otherwise due

fields.name: taxOnConsolidatedBase
fields.label: Tax on the consolidated tax base after foreign tax credits

fields.name: agriculturalProducerTaxAllowance
fields.label: Agricultural producer tax allowance, capped at 100,000 HUF

fields.name: taxAfterAgriculturalAllowance
fields.label: Tax on the consolidated tax base after the agricultural producer allowance

fields.name: tradeUnionOrChamberDues
fields.label: Trade-union representation dues or chamber membership dues

fields.name: dividendAdvanceReceived2024
fields.label: Dividend advance received during 2024

fields.name: dividendAdvanceWithheldTax2024
fields.label: Tax withheld on the 2024 dividend advance

fields.name: foreignTreatyExemptIncome
fields.label: Foreign-taxed income that is domestically tax-exempt under a double-taxation treaty

fields.name: rentalIncomeReducingItems
fields.label: Items reducing rental income from residential letting

fields.name: totalIncomeTax2024
fields.label: Total 2024 personal income tax

fields.name: onePlusOnePercentDesignationSettlementAmount
fields.label: Amount to be refunded or additionally paid based on the 1+1% designation declarations

fields.name: onePlusOnePercentDesignationSettlementNature
fields.label: Whether the 1+1% designation settlement amount is a refund to the taxpayer or an additional amount payable

fields.name: erroneousAdvanceDeclarationCostDifferenceBase
fields.label: Base amount of the cost difference arising from an incorrect declaration made when advance tax was assessed

fields.name: erroneousAdvanceDeclarationCostDifferenceTax
fields.label: 39% tax due on the cost difference arising from an incorrect advance-tax declaration

fields.name: totalTaxLiability2024
fields.label: Total 2024 tax liability
fields.sourceRef: 24SZJA-C, row 64 ("A 2024. évi adófizetési kötelezettség összege", sum of rows 44, 61, 62 and 63)

fields.name: employerWithheldAdvanceTax
fields.label: Advance tax withheld by employers/payers

fields.name: dividendAdvanceWithheldTax2023
fields.label: Tax withheld from the dividend advance received in 2023

fields.name: payerWithheldSourceTax
fields.label: Withholding tax deducted by payers

fields.name: advanceTaxDueQ1
fields.label: Advance tax/personal income tax owed for Q1 2024

fields.name: advanceTaxDueQ2
fields.label: Advance tax/personal income tax owed for Q2 2024

fields.name: advanceTaxDueQ3
fields.label: Advance tax/personal income tax owed for Q3 2024

fields.name: advanceTaxDueQ4
fields.label: Advance tax/personal income tax owed for Q4 2024

fields.name: advanceTaxActuallyPaid
fields.label: Advance tax/personal income tax actually paid by the taxpayer

fields.name: targetedUseTaxEqualizationAmount
fields.label: Amount recognized for targeted use / tax equalization

fields.name: surchargeTax12Percent
fields.label: 12% surcharge tax determined on the advance-payment shortfall

fields.name: taxPayablePerReturn
fields.label: Tax payable based on this return
fields.description: Populated when the taxpayer owes additional tax; mutually exclusive with taxRefundable in real-world use (the source form's row 79 and row 80 are alternatives, only one of which the taxpayer's own computation produces a positive figure for), though the Condition grammar has no field-presence primitive to validate this, so it is left as a documented business rule rather than a requiredWhen gate.

fields.name: taxRefundable
fields.label: Tax/advance tax reclaimable based on this return
fields.description: Populated when the taxpayer is owed a refund; mutually exclusive with taxPayablePerReturn (see that field's own description).

fields.name: installmentPaymentRequested
fields.label: Requesting the surcharge-free installment payment option for a combined personal income tax and social contribution tax liability of up to 500,000 HUF

fields.name: installmentPaymentMonths
fields.label: Number of months over which the installment payment is to be spread (2-12)
fields.sourceRef: 24SZJA-C, row 81 ("A választott időtartamot ... kell ebbe a mezőbe beírnia")

fields.name: refundPreference
fields.label: How the taxpayer wants any reclaimable amount handled
fields.sourceRef: Cover sheet (D) — the two "Jelölje X-szel" checkboxes for full refund vs. partial refund/transfer

fields.name: domesticBankAccountNumber
fields.label: Taxpayer's domestic (Hungarian) bank account number
fields.sourceRef: Cover sheet (D) — "Az Ön belföldi pénzforgalmi vagy fizetési számlaszáma"

fields.name: domesticBankName
fields.label: Name of the domestic financial service provider holding the account
fields.sourceRef: Cover sheet (D) — "Számlavezető belföldi pénzforgalmi szolgáltató neve"

fields.name: foreignBankAccountDetails
fields.label: Foreign bank account details, if the taxpayer has no domestic account
fields.description: The source form breaks this alternate path into eight separate boxes (account holder name, account number, country code, currency, IBAN yes/no, SWIFT code, institution name, institution address); collapsed into one free-text field since it is a secondary path used only by taxpayers without a Hungarian account.
fields.sourceRef: Cover sheet (D) — "Az Ön külföldi fizetési számlaszáma", account holder name, country code, currency, IBAN indicator, SWIFT code, and the foreign institution's name/address

fields.name: signaturePlace
fields.label: Place of signing

fields.name: signatureDate
fields.label: Date of signing

documents.label: Declaration that the return's data are true and complete
documents.statement: Felelősségem tudatában kijelentem, hogy a bevallásban közölt adatok a valóságnak megfelelnek és a szerepeltetett jövedelmeken kívül más bevallási kötelezettség alá eső jövedelmem nem volt. / I declare, aware of my responsibility, that the data provided in this return correspond to the truth, and that beyond the income shown I had no other income subject to a declaration obligation.
